notes: New Zealand row/QID/photo audit 2026-05-24: verifier confirmed all 26 squad-table rows and QID identities. Official NZ Football squad article lists Tim Payne at 50 caps and Matt/Matthew Garbett at 36 caps, so those caps override the Wikipedia table while squad_table_caps preserves the table values. Tyler Bindon remains Sheffield United because the tournament table uses last competitive/loan club while the NZ Football article lists parent club Nottingham Forest. Matthew Garbett and Nando Pijnaker had no clean Wikimedia portrait, P18 image, or pageimage and are marked reviewed-none.
